affected_pattern: VPN-enabled business accounts show 10x data usage after a corporate client config push
root_cause: VPN full-tunnel misconfiguration — a corporate MDM push set the VPN client to full-tunnel on cellular instead of split-tunnel, so all device traffic (including streaming and backup) now counts against the cellular plan.
supporting_evidence: Usage Spike RCA Playbook: VPN Routing Misconfig pattern
Traffic mix shifted from previously application-scoped to all-HTTPS to one egress
Corporate client change ticket CORP-9912 rolled out the same day
recommended_action: Work with the corporate customer to revert to split-tunnel
Offer temporary data-cap relief while the rollback completes
Credit excess usage proportionally to the mis-configuration window
Add detection rule: sustained > 5x historical baseline + egress fan-in
